scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm ci --prefix backend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix backend && npm prune --prefix backend --omit=dev
scripts.frontend:deploy: npm run frontend:build && npx netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=frontend/dist/frontend/browser
scripts.frontend:deploy:preview: npm run frontend:build && npx netlify-cli deploy --dir=frontend/dist/frontend/browser
